title: 1 Roll Clear Stretch Shrink Wrap (All Pack Sizes) 400mm x 250m x 23 Micron Strong Heavy Duty Packaging Cling Film Tear Resistant Water & Moisture Proof Multi Use Pallet Wrap
features: HEAVY-DUTY PROTECTION: Our Clear pallet shrink wrap, also known as cling film, offers superior cling and durability. Perfect for protecting furniture, luggage, and industrial shipments. Use this plastic wrap for moving, furniture wrapping, and ensuring your items stay secure during transit or storage.

VERSATILE USE: Ideal for a wide range of applications including moving house, furniture wrapping, pallet wrapping, and luggage wrapping. This shrink wrap roll, also referred to as stretch wrap or cling wrap for packing, is a must-have for both personal and industrial use.

EASY TO USE: The 400mm standard roll of cling film wrap is designed for effortless application, providing a tight and secure seal. Simplify your packing process with our user-friendly plastic wrap for furniture and other items.

HIGH CLING PERFORMANCE: Our shrink film adheres firmly to itself without the need for additional adhesives, making it an efficient solution for all your wrapping needs. This industrial cling film wrap is perfect for securing items with ease.

DURABLE AND RELIABLE: Made from high-quality plastic, this stretch wrap roll is tear-resistant and offers long-lasting protection. Ensure your items are well-protected with our reliable wrapping solution. Ideal for use as furniture wrap, pallet wrap, and luggage wrapping cling film.
